title: Submission: Atris Labs v8 (audited seed42, clean branch)
body:
This PR supersedes #515 with a clean submission-only branch.

Included files:
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-22_AtrisLabs_v8/README.md`
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-22_AtrisLabs_v8/submission.json`
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-22_AtrisLabs_v8/train.log`
- `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-22_AtrisLabs_v8/train_gpt.py`

Audited run included in this branch:
- `seed=42`
- `val_bpb=1.18069496`
- `val_loss=1.99355398`
- `bytes_total=14461499`
- `steps=6428` in `600.039s`

Why this replacement:
- keeps the diff to the submission folder only
- includes a real train log
- aligns README/JSON with the audited run in the branch
- avoids the earlier commit-history/co-author concerns on the submission branch

If preferred, I can close #515 after this replacement is reviewed.
